page: Microsoft Azure NC144ds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is a high-performance virtual machine instance built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by Intel processors. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server provides 144 dedicated vCPUs, delivering substantial parallel processing capabilities for compute-heavy operations.

The instance is equipped with 516.0 GB of system memory, yielding an allocation of approximately 3.58 GB of RAM per core. For storage-intensive tasks, the server includes 7921 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-throughput data access and substantial local caching.

With 1.0 GPU integrated into its hardware profile, this server is designed for workloads that benefit from hardware acceleration. The combination of massive local storage, high vCPU count, and dedicated GPU resources makes this instance suitable for data-intensive applications, machine learning workloads, and large-scale database operations.
description: Microsoft Azure NC144ds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine powered by Intel processors and the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 144 dedicated vCPUs, 516.0 GB of RAM (3.58 GB per core), 1.0 GPU, and 7921 GB of local storage. This Premium Storage capable instance is designed for resource-intensive workloads requiring high compute density, local disk capacity, and GPU acceleration. The hardware configuration makes it suitable for large-scale database operations, parallel processing, and GPU-accelerated workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NC144ds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is an x86_64 Intel-based server with 144 dedicated vCPUs, 516.0 GB RAM, 1.0 GPU, and 7921 GB local storage, optimized for GPU-accelerated and high-compute workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity GPU-accelerated virtual machine featuring 144 dedicated vCPUs, 516 GB RAM, and over 7 TB of local storage.
